regional_cost_note: Arborists in Gisborne typically charge $550–$1,800 for small tree removal and $2,200–$9,000+ for large trees. Stump grinding is $220–$650 per stump. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Ensure your arborist holds NZ Arboricultural Association accreditation and has current public liability insurance.
